title: ITALY enforcement action against Istituto tecnico industriale statale “Stanislao Cannizzaro” di Catania (10,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 10,000 on the Istituto tecnico industriale statale “Stanislao Cannizzaro” di Catania. The controller published the personal and health data of 51 students with disabilities, including their schedules, on its institutional website without a sufficient le...
